name: Black Bean Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Green bell peppers, finely diced
4 Fresh Jalapeno peppers, seeded and deveined, finely diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the beans in a large pot and cover with cold water. Bring to a boil.
2. Remove from heat and let stand 2 hours.
3. Drain the beans and return them to the pot. Add enough cold water to cover by two inches. Cover and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until the beans are tender but not mushy, about 2 hours. Add water as necessary.
4. Drain the beans, reserving 3 cups of liquid. Return the beans to the pot along with 1 cup of the cooking liquid.
5. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees. Place cumin and oregano in a small baking pan. Roast until fragrant, shaking occasionally, about 10 minutes.
6. Heat oil in a heavy skillet. Add onions, green peppers, and garlic. Stir over medium-high heat for 3 minutes. Add cumin and oregano mixture, paprika, cayenne, and salt. Cook until onions are soft, about 10 minutes. Mix in tomatoes and jalapenos. Bring to a boil.
7. Gently stir into the beans. If necessary, thin with reserved liquid.
8. Dice the red bell pepper into 1/4 pieces. Place 1 ounce of goat cheese in each bowl. Top with chili. Garnish with sour cream and diced red bell pepper. Serve warm tortillas separately. Serves 6 or more.
